questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The first blue ball drops from the blue hopper, rolls onto ramp_right at (3,1), continues to ramp_right at (4,2), ramp_right at (5,3), crossover at (6,4), then solution ramps: ramp_left at (7,5), ramp_left at (6,6), ramp_right at (5,7), ramp_left at (4,8), ramp_left at (3,9), exiting at the left side.

questions.question: In what order do balls exit the machine?
questions.answer: All 8 blue balls exit at the blue (left) exit. No balls are intercepted.

questions.question: How many ramps were placed by the solution?
questions.answer: The solution places 5 ramps: 2 ramp_left, 2 ramp_right, and 1 ramp_left/ramp_right combo at positions (7,5), (6,6), (5,7), (4,8), (3,9).
